[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111001010 5
1 0010110110 5
2 1011111101 8
3 0000010000 1
4 1110001100 5
5 0000000000 a
6 1000001001 3
7 1001100101 5

01 10 1000000001 2
12 21 0001000100 2
23 32 0101001000 3
34 43 0010000010 2
45 54 0010110100 4
56 65 0000010000 1 match 3
67 76 0000000000 a match 5
70 07 1000001000 2

02 20 0000001000 1
13 31 0001000000 1
24 42 0000000100 1
35 53 0011001000 3
46 64 0000010000 1 match 3
57 75 1010001100 4
60 06 0000000000 a match 5
71 17 1000000100 2

36 63 0000000000 a match 5
47 74 0010000100 2
50 05 1000001001 3 match 6
61 16 0000000000 a match 5
72 27 0100001100 3

37 73 0110001000 3
